message.content:
Explore the NestJS codebase at /Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-be/apps/api/src to understand:

1. The quote-request (or offer/buyback) module - find where offer requests are submitted, the service that creates them, and the entity structure
2. The notification module - how notifications are sent, what channels exist (WhatsApp, email), what the service interface looks like
3. Email templates - look in packages/email for existing templates
4. How WhatsApp messages are sent - find any existing WhatsApp integration
5. The admin notification pattern - how admin (Nizar) gets notified

Look at:
- src/modules/buyback/ or src/modules/ for offer/quote request related modules
- src/modules/notification/
- packages/email/
- Any WhatsApp or messaging service

Report: file paths, key service methods, entity fields, and how existing notifications are triggered.

content.text: I'll explore the codebase systematically. Let me start with parallel searches across all the relevant areas.

content.text: Now let me read all the key files in parallel:

content.content:
1	import {
2	  Column,
3	  Entity,
4	  JoinColumn,
5	  ManyToOne,
6	  OneToMany,
7	  OneToOne,
8	} from 'typeorm';
9	
10	import { BaseEntity } from '../utils';
11	import { BuybackEntity } from '@/db';
12	import { BuybackOfferEntity } from '@/db/entities/buyback-offer.entity';
13	import { AssetValuationEntity } from '@/db/entities/asset-valuation.entity';
14	import { AdminEntity } from '@/db/entities/admin.entity';
15	
16	export enum BuybackRequestStatus {
17	  // Quote
18	  New = 'NEW',
19	  PendingValuation = 'PENDING_VALUATION',
20	  ValuationReceived = 'VALUATION_RECEIVED',
21	
22	  // Pre-auth
23	  PreAuthOfferSent = 'OFFER_SENT',
24	  PreAuthOfferAccepted = 'OFFER_ACCEPTED',
25	
26	  // Post-auth
27	  AssetReceived = 'ASSET_RECEIVED',
28	  PendingAuth = 'PENDING_AUTH',
29	  AuthCompleted = 'AUTH_COMPLETED',
30	
31	  // Entrupy verification (optional step after AuthCompleted)
32	  PendingEntrupy = 'PENDING_ENTRUPY',
33	
34	  // Final offer
35	  FinalOfferSent = 'FINAL_OFFER_SENT',
36	  KycApproved = 'KYC_APPROVED',
37	  KycPending = 'KYC_PENDING',
38	
39	  // Offer accepted
40	  FinalOfferAccepted = 'FINAL_OFFER_ACCEPTED',
41	
42	  // Withdrawal in progress (after withdrawal request is created)
43	  TransactionPending = 'TRANSACTION_PENDING',
44	
45	  // Rejected (by admin)
46	  PreAuthVerificationFailed = 'PRE_AUTH_VERIFICATION_FAILED',
47	  PostAuthVerificationFailed = 'POST_AUTH_VERIFICATION_FAILED',
48	  KYCFailed = 'KYC_FAILED',
49	
50	  // Rejected (by user)
51	  RejectedPreAuthOffer = 'REJECTED_PRE_AUTH_OFFER',
52	  RejectedPostAuthOffer = 'REJECTED_POST_AUTH_OFFER',
53	
54	  // Expired (auto-cancelled after 48h)
55	  PreAuthOfferExpired = 'PRE_AUTH_OFFER_EXPIRED',
56	  PostAuthOfferExpired = 'POST_AUTH_OFFER_EXPIRED',
57	}
58	
59	export enum BuybackRequestStage {
60	  Quote = 'QUOTE',
61	  PreAuth = 'PRE_AUTH',
62	  PostAuth = 'POST_AUTH',
63	  FinalOffer = 'FINAL_OFFER',
64	  Rejected = 'REJECTED',
65	
66	  // went through the entire flow
67	  OfferAccepted = 'OfferAccepted',
68	}
69	
70	export type BuybackRequestEvent = {
71	  status: BuybackRequestStatus;
72	  stage: BuybackRequestStage;
73	  timestamp: Date;
74	};
75	
76	export enum AssetValuationType {
77	  PreAuth = 'PRE_AUTH',
78	  PostAuth = 'POST_AUTH',
79	}
80	
81	@Entity({
82	  name: 'buyback_request',
83	})
84	export class BuybackRequestEntity extends BaseEntity {
85	  @Column({
86	    name: 'status',
87	    type: 'enum',
88	    enum: BuybackRequestStatus,
89	  })
90	  status: BuybackRequestStatus;
91	
92	  @Column({
93	    name: 'stage',
94	    type: 'enum',
95	    enum: BuybackRequestStage,
96	  })
97	  stage: BuybackRequestStage;
98	
99	  @OneToOne(() => BuybackEntity, (entity) => entity.request, {
100	    onDelete: 'CASCADE',
101	  })
102	  buyback: BuybackEntity;
103	
104	  @OneToOne(() => BuybackOfferEntity, (entity) => entity.requestAsPreAuth, {
105	    onDelete: 'SET NULL',
106	    nullable: true,
107	  })
108	  @JoinColumn({ name: 'pre_auth_offer_id', referencedColumnName: 'id' })
109	  preAuthOffer: BuybackOfferEntity | null;
110	
111	  @Column({ type: 'uuid', name: 'pre_auth_offer_id', nullable: true })
112	  preAuthOfferId: string | null;
113	
114	  @OneToOne(() => BuybackOfferEntity, (entity) => entity.requestAsPostAuth, {
115	    onDelete: 'SET NULL',
116	    nullable: true,
117	  })
118	  @JoinColumn({ name: 'post_auth_offer_id', referencedColumnName: 'id' })
119	  postAuthOffer: BuybackOfferEntity | null;
120	
121	  @Column({ type: 'uuid', name: 'post_auth_offer_id', nullable: true })
122	  postAuthOfferId: string | null;
123	
124	  @OneToMany(() => AssetValuationEntity, (entity) => entity.buybackRequest)
125	  valuations: AssetValuationEntity[];
126	
127	  @Column({
128	    name: 'reject_reason',
129	    type: 'text',
130	    nullable: true,
131	  })
132	  rejectReason: string;
133	
134	  @Column({
135	    name: 'events_log',
136	    type: 'jsonb',
137	  })
138	  eventsLog: { data: BuybackRequestEvent[] };
139	
140	  // Entrupy verification fields
141	  @Column({
142	    name: 'entrupy_required',
143	    type: 'boolean',
144	    default: false,
145	  })
146	  entrupyRequired: boolean;
147	
148	  @Column({
149	    name: 'entrupy_skipped',
150	    type: 'boolean',
151	    default: false,
152	  })
153	  entrupySkipped: boolean;
154	
155	  @Column({
156	    name: 'entrupy_skipped_reason',
157	    type: 'text',
158	    nullable: true,
159	  })
160	  entrupySkippedReason: string | null;
161	
162	  @ManyToOne(() => AdminEntity, { nullable: true, onDelete: 'SET NULL' })
163	  @JoinColumn({ name: 'entrupy_skipped_by_id', referencedColumnName: 'id' })
164	  entrupySkippedBy: AdminEntity | null;
165	
166	  @Column({ type: 'uuid', name: 'entrupy_skipped_by_id', nullable: true })
167	  entrupySkippedById: string | null;
168	}
169
